Milkshake Mania
Features Tips Gameplay FAQ About
Play

About Milkshake Mania

Everything you need to know: quick start, gameplay, progression, credits, and licenses.

Quick start

  1. Click the blend button — your primary action to produce milkshakes.
  2. Watch your money grow — each shake earns cash you can reinvest.
  3. Unlock upgrades — buy improvements to increase earnings per blend.
  4. Hire employees — earn passively while away.
  5. Expand — grow your shop into a larger business.

How to play

The milkshake blender is the central mechanic. Each click makes a shake and grants money. Base blend time starts around 7.5s and can be reduced via upgrades.

Making money

  • Manual blending — full payout per click.
  • Auto-blend — optional automation to reduce clicking.
  • Employees — passive income, paid periodically.

Upgrades & shops

Use the Upgrades and Employees screens to buy improvements and staff. Shop extensions increase capacity and unlock further progression.

Special outcomes

Lucky blends pay bonus cash — rarer ones pay far more:

  • Crusty — small bonus
  • Creamy — small bonus
  • Decorated Baked — moderate bonus
  • Swirled — large bonus
  • Golden — very large bonus

…and more. Effects can stack for multiplied rewards.

Screens & HUD

  • Milkshake panel — main blender, money, progress.
  • Upgrades — purchase and view effects.
  • Employees — hire and manage worker output.
  • Shop extensions & stats — expand and review totals.
  • Settings — export/import saves, hard reset, and preferences.

Economy & progression

Typical goals by stage:

  • Early — focus on upgrades and small hires.
  • Mid — hire better staff and scale output.
  • Late — maximize staff and upgrades for late-game growth.

Tips & FAQ

Tip: upgrades often give higher ROI early on than extra hires. Save and check back for sales.

FAQ: progress autosaves; export/import is available in Settings for backups.

Credits

Creator: Strider657 — design, development, audio.

Concept designer: Oliver382 — concepts and feature ideas.

Contributors & testers: see the project repository for the full list.

Licenses & attributions

Icons: Lucide. Other libraries and assets are credited in the repository and included with the project.

Back to homepage or play the game. Repository: GitHub.
